backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing e-commerce backend with product catalog, shopping cart per user (by Principal), and order management including CRUD operations for products, cart items, and checkout flow.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (product catalog, shopping cart, authentication, checkout, visual design, and image rendering) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing React components, pages, hooks, and configuration for the e-commerce application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining OKLCH color system with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, including primary, secondary, muted, accent, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for product catalog, cart, checkout, order confirmation, and order history, wrapping protected routes with authentication.
Button component with quantity input that adds products to cart, displaying loading spinner during mutation and success checkmark with temporary feedback.
frontend/src/components/AuthButton.tsx: Authentication button showing login for anonymous users or dropdown menu with truncated principal, order history link, and logout option for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/CartItemRow.tsx: Cart item component displaying product image, details, editable quantity input with live backend updates, subtotal calculation, and remove button.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header containing logo, cart icon with item count badge, and auth button; includes footer with branding and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card component displaying product image, name, description, price badge, and an AddToCartButton with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication status and shows login prompt card if user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Provides React Query hooks for cart operations: fetching cart items, adding items to cart, and removing items from cart with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useCheckout.ts: React Query mutation hook for checkout process that calls backend checkout method and invalidates cart and orders queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching products (all products, single product by ID) and orders from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page displaying order summary with cart items, total calculation, and checkout button that creates order and navigates to confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Displays order confirmation page after checkout, showing order ID, total amount, and list of purchased items with navigation options to order history or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistory.tsx: Placeholder page for order history that currently shows an empty state with a message that the backend lacks a method to retrieve user order history.
frontend/src/pages/ProductCatalog.tsx: Main product catalog page with hero banner and grid layout displaying all products using ProductCard components, with loading skeletons and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/ShoppingCart.tsx: Shopping cart page showing cart items with quantities, order summary with total, and checkout button that requires Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extending colors using OKLCH color space, container settings, typography, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (product catalog, shopping cart, Internet Identity auth, checkout flow) and pending feature requests for the 'Sells For You' e-commerce platform.
